title: RRB Group D 27 Nov 2025 Shift 1
short_description: RRB Group D 2025 CBT paper, covering General Science, Math, and Reasoning.
description:
### Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) Group D 2025

**Post:** Level-1 Posts (Track Maintainer, Pointsman, various Assistants)

This comprehensive mock test replicates the official **Computer Based Test (CBT)** for the Indian Railways Level-1 recruitment. Practicing this paper will help you understand the exam pattern, time management, and difficulty level of actual RRB Group D exams.

#### Exam Pattern & Sections:
1.  **General Science (25 Marks):** Physics, Chemistry, and Life Sciences (10th standard CBSE syllabus).
2.  **Mathematics (25 Marks):** Number System, Algebra, Geometry, Trigonometry, Mensuration, and Statistics.
3.  **General Intelligence & Reasoning (30 Marks):** Analogies, Coding-Decoding, Syllogism, Venn Diagrams, and Analytical Reasoning.
4.  **General Awareness & Current Affairs (20 Marks):** Science & Technology, Sports, Culture, Personalities, Economics, and Politics.
seo_title: RRB Group D 27 Nov 2025 Shift 1 CBT Mock Test | Official Question Paper
seo_description: Prepare for the RRB Group D 2025 CBT with our free online mock test. Practice official questions on General Science, Math, and Reasoning.
